items.title: Start with polite `сиз` forms
items.summary: In first meetings, default to polite address. This chapter uses `сиз` and polite endings before any casual shift.

items.title: Use `Менин атым ...` for names
items.summary: A safe beginner pattern for self-introduction is `Менин атым ...`, literally `my name is ...`.

items.title: `-мин` builds simple identity statements
items.summary: In sentences like `Мен студентмин`, the ending `-мин` helps express `I am` with a noun.
